theme_and_archetype.description: Bright cartoon flat art in the palette of Chicken Road / Crossy Road. Voxel-like, blocky UI elements, high contrast, playful.

typography.font_family_heading: Fredoka One, Nunito-Black, or system default bold rounded
typography.guidelines: Use heavy weights for headings. Use tracking-tight for large text. Ensure high contrast against backgrounds.

buttons.style: Chunky, blocky feel. borderBottomWidth: 4, borderRadius: 16. Colors should pop.
buttons.active_state: Translate Y by 2px and reduce borderBottomWidth to 2px to simulate pressing down.

cards.style: Flat white backgrounds with subtle 4px bottom border in light gray to look like physical blocks on the background.

habit_lane.description: A horizontal scrolling area. Each day is a square block (tile). Left side is past, right side is future.
habit_lane.character_marker: A neutral runner icon floating above the current day's tile.

screens.name: Welcome/Tutorial
screens.description: 3 swipeable slides explaining: 1) Add habits 2) Complete days to build green road 3) Missed days create fire blocks. Big bold illustrations.

screens.name: Main Screen
screens.description: Vertical list of habits. Each habit shows its name and a horizontal road (lane). The road shows the last 7 days. A 'Done Today' button at the right end of the lane.

screens.name: Habit Detail
screens.description: Deep dive into a single habit. Shows the full road history, calendar heatmap, and edit options.

screens.name: Add Habit
screens.description: Form to create a new habit. Requires name, category color, and icon.

screens.name: Stats
screens.description: Gamification center. Shows badges and overall consistency.

game_mechanics.daily_completion: Changes the current day tile to 'success_tile' (green). Character moves one step forward (right).
game_mechanics.missed_day: Changes the tile to 'missed_fire_tile' (orange/fire). Breaks the streak.
game_mechanics.milestones: Every 7th consecutive day completed becomes a 'milestone_gold' tile.
game_mechanics.badges: Completing 30 days in a row unlocks the 'Month Master' badge.

image_urls.description: Cartoon road style reference for welcome screen
Gold round coin representing Month Master badge

images_and_assets.icons_strategy: Use @expo/vector-icons (MaterialCommunityIcons or FontAwesome5). Stick to solid, rounded icons to match the flat art style.

testing.test_id_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing. For React Native, apply both testID='id' and data-testid='id' as properties on the component.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native app. Do not use HTML/Tailwind classes.
Write all components in .js files, NOT .tsx files.
Use StyleSheet for styling. Emulate Tailwind's generous spacing philosophy (e.g., use padding: 16 instead of 4).
For the 'Crossy Road' flat art blocky style, emulate 3D using backgroundColor with borderBottomWidth: 4 and borderRightWidth: 2 with a darker shade (or rgba(0,0,0,0.1)) on Views and Buttons.
Implement the 'Habit Lane' as a horizontal FlatList or ScrollView.
Tiles should be perfectly square Views.
Make sure forms disable the Save button until required fields are filled.
For typography, if custom fonts aren't easily configured, use fontWeight: '900' for headings to simulate thick cartoon fonts.
Assign a data-testid and testID to all TouchableOpacity, TextInput, and important Text components (e.g., data-testid='habit-item-card').
